caption: onboarding
title: What are you making?
subtitle: Pick only the components you need to color. Attributes and slots will be derived from your selection — you'll assign colors within that scope.

removeComponent.title: Remove {{component}}?
removeComponent.description_one: {{count}} color assignment on this component will be cleared.
removeComponent.description_other: {{count}} color assignments on this component will be cleared.

removeGroup.title: Remove {{count}} components?
removeGroup.description_one: {{count}} color assignment across these components will be cleared.
removeGroup.description_other: {{count}} color assignments across these components will be cleared.

removeAll.title: Clear everything?
removeAll.description: Removing the last component will also wipe primitives, symbols and attributes. Cancel to keep your work.
